purpose: Agent improvement loop evidence, eval, handoff, and audit trail.

directories.feedback: Human, model-judge, CI, or support feedback records.
directories.evals: Eval case definitions or links to project-native evals.
directories.runs: Per-iteration review, repair, validation, and remaining delta records.
directories.handoffs: Codex handoff documents for bounded implementation work.
directories.decisions: Accepted, rejected, or deferred harness decisions.
